scope.purpose: Classify the existing Phase 0/1 timing evidence by its real measurement boundary, prevent nested or harness time from being double-counted, and reserve explicit target-architecture edit, Validate and Export slots without inventing measurements.
scope.current_effect: Evidence and future measurement control only. This contract changes neither macro, accepts no latency budget and authorises no optimisation or Phase 2 source movement.
scope.bounded_claim: Existing profiles identify legacy operator-action costs and the chair-chain dominant cost family. They do not yet provide a target-architecture lightweight-edit or deferred exact-geometry baseline.
scope.terminology: Profile IDs retain plain-line wording even when an owning command or historical report uses the frozen legacy ordinary-track identifier.

accounting_policy.clock: Use monotonic/performance wall time around the declared boundary; process CPU, RSS, object, recompute, cache and shape metrics are supporting dimensions rather than substitutes for wall time.
accounting_policy.reconciliation_rule: Reconcile parent, non-overlapping child and uncovered time within each individual run, then report the median and range of those per-run results. Never subtract or add independently selected medians to manufacture a run total.
accounting_policy.nesting_rule: A nested component is already contained in its parent and must have add_to_primary=false. A child nested inside another child must not also be added beside that ancestor.
accounting_policy.harness_rule: Process launch, macro load, fixture opening, polling, screenshots, artifact parsing, deep semantic walks and cleanup are harness time unless the declared operator action explicitly includes them.
accounting_policy.cache_rule: Cold, same-process later action, warm-up and measured unchanged-result reuse are separate states. A destructive replay is not a warm-cache measurement.
accounting_policy.persistence_rule: A persisted internal profile is usable only if it is written after all work it claims to cover. A complete enclosing stage timer remains usable when a nested persisted payload is rejected.
accounting_policy.budget_rule: No observed B14/B15 time is an accepted human-use budget. Numerical gates require later representative target-architecture baselines and owner acceptance.

required_markers: the report was not reset immediately before this sequence
reconciling manager-session performance history is an instrumentation gap

includes: document open and B14 load
fixture validation and manager setup
seven external driver-stage calls
reporting, save, inventory and rendered evidence

related_spans.relationship_to_primary: non-overlapping child stage calls within each controller run
per-run controller remainder reported separately; its median is not arithmetically paired with the independently selected parent median
per-run gap between controller and B14 internal stage total; overlaps non-stage work and external-versus-internal stage gaps

reconciliation.method: The report derives controller remainder and controller-minus-internal values in each run before reporting medians.

profiles.dominant_cost_finding: Chair analysis, bounded support, 2D layout, host integration and 3D chair preparation exceed 99.3 percent of B14 internal recorded wall time in every controlled run.
gaps: The controller interval includes harness work and is not one operator button action.
Geometry and other external stage boundaries exceed the B14 internal wrappers by measured but not fully attributed work.
The internal report has the chair persistence and status/reuse defects listed below.

includes: real Generate supported chair solids panel method
direct generation/reuse function
post-function parent and panel refresh
excludes: selection setup and complete asynchronous job harness

related_spans.relationship_to_primary: per-run derived panel remainder dominated by parent/panel refresh; not independently additive
sibling audit after the panel action within the complete job
ancestor including the panel action, separate audit and fingerprint/setup work

reconciliation.method: Direct-function and panel remainder are reconciled per iteration; complete job and separate audit remain diagnostic harness boundaries.

profiles.dominant_cost_finding: The unchanged panel action retains 94.70 percent of the comparable cold stage cost; post-function refresh is about 79 percent of warm panel time.
gaps: The solid reuse test occurs after rebuilding and validating its plan inputs.
Parent/panel refresh repeats status work after valid object reuse.
Status functions re-extract records and rebuild signatures without one shared snapshot.

includes: dialog and replacement confirmation
calculation and legacy exact Part shape construction
document replacement, metadata, recomputes, reports and success dialog
excludes: process launch, B14 load and fixture open
later history, save/reopen and negative actions

reconciliation.method: The driver times the complete modal action; semantic validation is outside the timer.

profiles.dominant_cost_finding: This is the fixed legacy exact-shape editing boundary, not a lightweight edit measurement.
gaps: Calculation, persistence, display and exact-shape construction are not internally separated.
No target lightweight edit or deferred Validate boundary exists.

includes: dialog construction and configured preview
confirmation and late safety recheck
staged export, manifest commit, summary and post-success preview refresh
excludes: process launch, B14 load and fixture open
artifact parsing and later revision/overwrite/failure scenarios
construction of exact shapes already retained by the fixture

related_spans.relationship_to_primary: three sibling full probe preflights within the complete action
nested staged write, commit and cleanup call within the complete action
nested inside the selected-export transaction and therefore also inside the complete action

reconciliation.method: Full action remains the total; probe and transaction medians are reported as nested diagnostics and are not added to it or to each other across runs.

profiles.dominant_cost_finding: Three full exporter-bound probe preflights consume about 51 percent of the complete legacy action.
gaps: The path exports retained legacy exact shapes and does not measure deferred reconstruction.
Other selection scopes and entity families remain unprofiled.

includes: dialog and confirmation
calculation, fresh legacy exact-shape construction and document replacement
one full preflight, export plus manifest, reports, recomputes and result UI
excludes: process launch, B14 load and fixture open

nested production-export call inside the complete action

reconciliation.method: The complete action is authoritative; preflight and export are contained siblings and their independently reported medians are not subtracted from the parent median.

profiles.dominant_cost_finding: The legacy action combines editing, exact construction and export; it proves total cost but cannot serve as separate target edit and Validate budgets.
gaps: Current create-time output is non-atomic after a late failure and is not the successor acceptance contract.
No explicit Validate boundary or export-from-validated-state measurement exists.

Independent datum, physical station/platform and target-file export remain open.

observed_instrumentation_defects.safe_current_use: Use the external driver-stage or declared complete action for operator cost. Use the internal preview/commit values only as labelled nested diagnostics, with the per-run gap retained.
observed_instrumentation_defects.required_fix_evidence: Record a shared action/correlation identity and nested span tree around host refresh, preview, confirmation, commit and post-action refresh; reconcile each run and retain the separate preview/commit feasibility regression.

observed_instrumentation_defects.safe_current_use: Reject persisted chair performance_timings_ms as a complete operation profile. The enclosing panel/stage wall boundary remains valid when its scope is declared.
observed_instrumentation_defects.required_fix_evidence: Persist the final timing payload only after metadata, display/visibility, recompute and transaction-commit measurements exist; save/reopen it and reconcile its total with the enclosing action.

observed_instrumentation_defects.safe_current_use: Treat the direct reuse duration as the current cost of proving reuse, not as saved construction time or an acceptable cache-hit cost.

source_anchors.contains: plan = _chair_build_solid_plan(doc, kind, config, analysis, rails, timbers, settings)

observed_instrumentation_defects.required_fix_evidence: On an unchanged valid signature, return the identical object/shape before plan and physical-fit input reconstruction; mutate every signature input class and prove full validation/construction resumes.

observed_instrumentation_defects.safe_current_use: Use the complete panel action for operator latency and retain the direct-function span as a nested diagnostic; do not describe the direct return as the complete cache-hit cost.
observed_instrumentation_defects.required_fix_evidence: Prove one unchanged panel action retains object/shape identity with no redundant parent/panel reconstruction or document recompute, while changed status remains correct and visible.

observed_instrumentation_defects.safe_current_use: Status-validation and refresh durations are diagnostic aggregate costs. Do not attribute them to one status function or infer independent additive costs from nested status calls.
observed_instrumentation_defects.required_fix_evidence: Use one immutable status/signature snapshot or demonstrably bounded reuse, prove equivalent unchanged statuses, then invalidate correctly for every relevant analysis/support/layout/solid input class.

target_pipeline_slots.required_boundary: One accepted parameter edit from stable canonical model state through lightweight 2D presentation becoming current, with no exact Part shape or solid construction.
required_metrics: calculation, persistence, recompute and display spans
exact-shape construction count fixed at zero
target_pipeline_slots.owner_gate: Phase 5 must populate this slot with the measured renderer/edit prototype and its correctness oracle before a lightweight interaction budget or optimisation claim is accepted.

target_pipeline_slots.required_boundary: Explicit Validate from current lightweight model through exact geometry construction, semantic/topology validation, transient or retained production state, recompute and truthful result UI.
required_metrics: calculation, construction, validation, persistence and recompute spans
target_pipeline_slots.owner_gate: No implementation exists before the modular architecture phases; Phase 1 freezes the recipe slot and Phase 6 evidence must populate it before the affected path is optimised or retired.

target_pipeline_slots.required_boundary: Explicit export from an already validated canonical model through final safety preflight, deterministic writes/manifest, atomic commit, cleanup and summary.
required_metrics: preflight, serialisation/write, commit and cleanup spans
target_pipeline_slots.owner_gate: Phase 6 must populate this slot for the selected slice by measuring the accepted atomic exporter separately from deferred construction and preserving output/rollback equivalence; Phase 9 extends it to every RC output family.

target_pipeline_slots.required_boundary: One reconciled operator journey from an accepted edit through lightweight presentation, explicit Validate, export and cleanup, retaining the three child action spans without double-counting.
required_metrics: per-action and uncovered wall time reconciled in every run
final document/object state and deterministic output semantics
target_pipeline_slots.owner_gate: Phase 6 must first populate this slot for the selected slice after the Phase 5 edit and Phase 6 Validate/export child boundaries exist; Phase 9 extends it to every RC output family and Phase 11 uses it for qualification.

closed_by_this_contract: Every retained timing is classified as operator action, nested component, harness, same-process correctness or missing target boundary.
The existing controlled curve/multiple-track, straight/station, turnout/crossover, editing and export profiles have explicit scopes, states and forbidden comparison uses.
All five observed instrumentation defects have a safe current-use boundary and named fix evidence instead of being silently treated as valid subprofiles.
The target lightweight Edit, explicit Validate, export-from-validated and complete edit-through-export measurement slots are explicit and unmeasured.
still_open: Implement and measure the four target-pipeline slots; no current profile is eligible to set their budgets or select a code optimisation.
Characterise crossover preview/commit feasibility under one accepted diagnostic rule; this correctness gap is related to but not closed by timing reconciliation.
Add sampled peak-memory evidence where a later optimisation needs ownership/peak claims; current RSS values are end-minus-start snapshots.
Preserve all four unmeasured target slots and their named Phase 5, 6, 9, 10 and 11 gates after the accepted 2026-07-22 Phase 1 closeout.
